calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff's Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment is granted.

The documents submitted in support of Plaintiff's unopposed motion establish: (1) the injunctive relief required by the settlement complies with Proposition 65; (2) the civil penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria in Health and Safety Code 25249.7(b); and (3) the attorney's fees and costs to be awarded by stipulation are reasonable under California law. The court will sign the stipulated Consent Judgement and maintain jurisdiction to enforce the judgment pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure 664.6.

Proposed order and proposed consent judgment are submitted.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CM)
